+++
title = "Supported Specifications"
description = "API and data specifications supported by Noir, including OpenAPI, RAML, HAR, and GraphQL."
weight = 2
sort_by = "weight"

+++

Beyond source code analysis, Noir can parse API and data specification formats such as existing API documentation and captured network traffic. Callee and AI context columns are source-analysis features, so specification imports are marked unsupported for those buckets.

<!-- AUTOGENERATED-->

| Specification | Format | endpoint | method | query | path | body | header | cookie | static_path | websocket | callee | ai_guards | ai_sinks | ai_validators | ai_signals |
|---|---|---|---|---|---|---|---|---|---|---|---|---|---|---|---|
| GraphQL | GRAPHQL | ☑️ | ☑️ | ☑️ | ☑️ | ☑️ | ☑️ | ☑️ | ✗ | ✗ | ✗ | ✗ | ✗ | ✗ | ✗ |
| Grpc | PROTOBUF | ☑️ | ☑️ | ☑️ | ☑️ | ☑️ | ✗ | ✗ | ✗ | ✗ | ✗ | ✗ | ✗ | ✗ | ✗ |
| HAR | JSON | ☑️ | ☑️ | ☑️ | ☑️ | ☑️ | ☑️ | ☑️ | ✗ | ✗ | ✗ | ✗ | ✗ | ✗ | ✗ |

| OpenAPI 2.0 (Swagger) | YAML | ☑️ | ☑️ | ☑️ | ☑️ | ☑️ | ☑️ | ☑️ | ✗ | ✗ | ✗ | ✗ | ✗ | ✗ | ✗ |

| OpenAPI 3.0 | YAML | ☑️ | ☑️ | ☑️ | ☑️ | ☑️ | ☑️ | ☑️ | ✗ | ✗ | ✗ | ✗ | ✗ | ✗ | ✗ |
